name: whoami
description: Who Am I? — an interactive study of the human condition, as an offline-capable PWA.

scripts.check: node --check assets/js/app.js && node --check assets/js/store.js && node --check sw.js && node -e "import('./content/book.js').then(m=>console.log('content OK:', m.book.chapters.length, 'chapters'))"
